name: Maria Meneghini Callas
abstract: Maria Callas (born Maria Anna Cecilia Sophia Kalogeropoulos; December 2, 1923 – September 16, 1977) was an American and Greek soprano, and one of the most renowned and influential opera singers of the 20th century. Critics praised her bel canto technique, wide-ranging voice, and dramatic interpretations.

concerts.label: Maria Callas, Soprano, and Giuseppe Di Stefano, Tenor

works.t: La Gioconda: Act IV. Suicidio! ...in questi fieri momenti tu sol mi resti

Manon Lescaut: Act IV. Sola, perduta, abbandonata
L'elisir d'amore: Act I. Una parola, oh! Adina

about_quotes.speaker: Benny Golson
about_quotes.evidence: Maria Callas was getting off the train in the next car. We thought they were coming for us.
